slides.title: Buve (Nationalisms): iNingizimu Afrika, Middle East ne-Afrika
slides.lead: Kucatsanisa timhlangano lemine yebuve - buve bemaBhunu (Afrikaner) nebuve bema-Afrika eNingizimu Afrika, kanye ne-Zionism nebuve bema-Arab e-Middle East - kubuta kutsi buve bungabahlanganisa njani bantfu bese buhlukanise live linye.

media.alt: Emaflegi lamane lentiwe ngendlela lecondzile aphuma esikhungweni semhlaba, amelela timhlangano lemine yebuve leticatsaniswako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka lonkhe lolucwaningo njengekufundza lokucatsanisako, hhayi tindzaba letine letehlukene. Sho umbuto lomkhulu wemlandvo: kungani buve - emandla lanika bantfu bunikati, kutigcabha nenkhululeko - kanti-njalo buveta kukhishwa ngaphandle nekungezwani? Beka embili kwakhiwa: kucala uchaze buve, bese uhlola emacala lamabili aseNingizimu Afrika (buve bemaBhunu nebe-Afrika), bese emacala lamabili ase-Middle East (Zionism nebuve bema-Arab), ucatsanisa njengoba uhamba. Khumbuta bafundzi kutsi lomunye walomlandvo uphikiswana kakhulu futsi usenetimvo kuze kube nyalo, ngako siphatsa imitfombo ngekuhlola nangenhlonipho.

slides.title: Yini buve (nationalism)?
slides.lead: Buve kukholelwa kutsi licembu labantfu labahlanganyela bunikati (identity) benta 'sive' lesifanele sibe nembuso waso, kwetsembeka nekutentela tincumo.

blocks.text: **Sive** 'kuyimphahla lecatjangwako' (*imagined community*): emalunga aso ngeke ahlangane nalabanye labaningi labakubo, kodvwa bativa babambene ndzawonye. **Buve** buguculela lomuzwa ube sicelo sepolitiki - lilungelo lekutibusa esiveni saso.

Bacwaningi bemlandvo bavame kwehlukanisa tinhlobo letimbili. **Buve bebakhaya (civic nationalism)** bubeka sive ngekwebuhlanga lobubodvwa, imitsetfo nemagugu, ngako noma ngubani angajoyina. **Buve bebuhlanga (ethnic nationalism)** busibeka ngekweludzabu, lulwimi, inkholo nome lisiko, lokungakhipha labangaphandle. Iminyakato leminingi lengiyo ihlanganisa tona totimbili.

items: Buvame kusekelwa elulwimini, enkholweni, emlandvweni nome emuzweni weludzabu lolufananako.
Buvame buvuswe nome buciniswe sikhalo lesifananako - kwehlulwa, buphuya, kubandlululwa nome kubuswa ngulabangaphandle.
Bwakha bunye ngekuchaza 'tsina', kodvwa ngekwenta njalo buphindze buchaze 'bona'.

slides.notes: Nika bafundzi emagama ekuhlatiya labatawuwasebentisa kuyo yonke le-unit: sive, buve, kutentela tincumo, buve bebakhaya kucatsaniswa nebuve bebuhlanga, kanye nemcondvo wa-Benedict Anderson we'mmango locatjangwako' (imagined community). Gcizelela kutsi buve abukalungi nje njalo futsi abukabi mbi nje njalo - bwachuba inkhululeko lemelene nebukoloni futsi bwachuba kukhishwa ngaphandle ne-apartheid. Likhono lelifundziswako kukucatsanisa: umcondvo lofananako, timo letehlukene.

slides.title: Imibuto lesihlanu longayibuta kunobe nguliphi buve
slides.lead: Sebentisa lelo liso lelifananako kuwo onkhe umhlangano khona utawukwati kuwacatsanisa ngalokulinganako.

blocks.heading: Ngubani?
blocks.text: Ngubani lobalwa njengelunga lesive - futsi ngubani loshiywe ngaphandle?

blocks.heading: Kungani nyalo?
blocks.text: Nguliphi likhalo nome inkinga leyavusa lomhlangano?

blocks.heading: Njani?
blocks.text: Baholi babahlanganisa njani bantfu - ngelisiko, inkholo, tinhlangano, nome sento lesikhulu?

blocks.heading: Umhlaba?
blocks.text: Nguliphi live labalifunako, futsi ngubani lomunye lolubalako?

blocks.heading: Umphumela?
blocks.text: Baletsa inkhululeko, kubusa ngenkani, kulwa - nome konkhe loku kotsatfu?

slides.notes: Loku luhlaka lwekucatsanisa bafundzi lokufanele balusebentise ebuveni bemaBhunu, ebuveni bema-Afrika, ku-Zionism nasebuveni bema-Arab ngayinye ngekulandzelana. Bakhutsate kutsi bagcine igridi yekucatsanisa etincwadzini tabo netikhundla letisihlanu. Khombisa kutsi umbuto wekutsi 'Umhlaba?' ngulapho emacala lamabili aba lusizi khona: kuto totimbili iNingizimu Afrika ne-Israel/Palestine, tinhlobo tebuve letimbili tabanga live linye.

slides.title: Buve bemaBhunu: kwehlulwa, buphuya nekuvuseleleka
slides.lead: Buve bemaBhunu bakhula ngenca yelihlazo eMphini yaseNingizimu Afrika (1899-1902) nebuphuya lebemaBhunu lamanyenti abhekana nabo emvakwaloko.

blocks.text: Kwehlulwa yiBrithani, kufa kwebafati nebantfwana emakamu ekuhlanganiswa (concentration camps), nekulahlekelwa ngemarephabhulikhi emaBhunu (Boer republics) kwashiya emaBhunu lamanyenti aziva kutsi volk (sive) laso lisengoticini. Kuleminyaka leyalandzela, emashumi etinkhulungwane aba 'bamhlophe labaphuyile', bacoshwa emhlabeni bangeniswa emadolobheni.

Baholi basebentisa **lulwimi, inkholo nemlandvo** kwakha kabusha kutigcabha. SiBhunu (Afrikaans) sabekwa saphindze sachutjelwa embili; iSontfo leliReformed lagcizelela emaBhunu njengesive lesikhetsiwe; kanti nendzaba yeMhambo Lomkhulu (Great Trek) yaba yindzaba yesisusa yesive lesilwela inkhululeko.

items: **I-Afrikaner Broederbond** (leyasungulwa nga-1918) yakha luchungechunge loluyimfihlo lwekuchubekisa tintfo temaBhunu kwezepolitiki, ebhizinisini nasesikweni.
Tinhlangano tesiko kanye nemnyaka lweminyaka lelikhulu weMhambo Lomkhulu nga-1938 kwavusa umuzwa lomkhulu.
**Iqembu leNational Party** laletsa lobunikati kulwela emandla embuso.

media.alt: Simo semoyoyo we-ox-wagon ngaphansi kwelilanga leliphumako, likhumbuta iMhambo Lomkhulu (Great Trek) lebeyisetjentiswa njengelupawu lwebuve.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza kutsi umuzwa wekuba sisulu waguculwa waba luhlelo lwepolitiki njani. Indlela lesemcoka: sikhalo (kwehlulwa, buphuya bebamhlophe) kuhlanganiswe nekuhlanganiswa kwesiko (lulwimi, iSontfo, indzaba yemlandvo, i-Broederbond) kulingana nemhlangano lomkhulu. Umnyaka lweminyaka lelikhulu weGreat Trek ka-1938 usibonelo lesihle sesiko lesentiwe. [SME] Phatsa inkhumbulo yemakamu ekuhlanganiswa (concentration camps) ngekunakekela nangeliciniso; iyiliciniso ngokwemlandvo futsi yasetjentiswa kwepolitiki emuva. Veta kutsi lokubuve bebuhlanga lobuchazwa ngeludzabu, lulwimi nenkholo.

slides.title: 1948: Buve bemaBhunu buthatsa umbuso
slides.lead: Nga-1948 iNational Party yawina emandla yase iguculela buve bemaBhunu inchubomgomo lesemtsetfweni ye-apartheid.

blocks.text: Buholwa ngu**D.F. Malan**, iNational Party yawina lukhetho lwabamhlophe kuphela lwango-1948 ngesetsembiso se-*apartheid* ('kwehlukaniswa'). Buve bemaBhunu manje besilawula umbuso busisebentisa kuvikela imisebenti, lulwimi nemandla emaBhunu - nekugcizelela kubusa kwabamhlophe etikwelinyenti lemnyama.

items: Umbuso wakhulisa imfundvo yesiBhunu, insimbi yembuso netimboni tembuso kute uphakamise emaBhunu.
Imitsetfo ye-apartheid yehlukanisa bantfu ngekwebuhlanga yase igcina emandla nemalungelo kubamhlophe.
Lesi sona simo sebuve lesatfola kutentela tincumo kulelinye licembu ngekuwakhipha lamanye.

media.alt: Igrafu yema-bar lephakamako embikwesakhiwo sahulumende, ibonisa licembu linye litfola emandla ngekulahlekelwa kwalamanye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dvweba iphuzu lekuhlatiya ngekusobala: buve bemaBhunu 'baphumelela' nga-1948, kodvwa kuphumelela kwabo bekukucindzeteleka kwalabanye bantfu. Loku kubeka kungezwani lokucondzile nebuve bema-Afrika. Buyela eluhlakeni: Ngubani lofakiwe? (EmaBhunu, bese bamhlophe.) Ngubani loshiywe ngaphandle? (Linyenti lelimnyama.) Veta kutsi i-apartheid beyiluhlelo lwekwakha imisebenti nekuphakamisa emaBhunu laphuyile, lokusita kuchaza kutsi yayitsandvwa njani emmangweni wayo.

slides.title: Buve bema-Afrika: bunye ngekumelana nekukhishwa ngaphandle
slides.lead: Buve bema-Afrika bakhula ngekuphendvula kunchobo, kulahlekelwa umhlaba nekukhishwa embusweni we-Union of South Africa lowasungulwa nga-1910.

blocks.text: I-Union of South Africa (1910) yahlanganisa bamhlophe kodvwa yakhipha ema-Afrika emandleni epolitiki. Nga-1912 baholi bema-Afrika labafundzile basungula **i-South African Native National Congress** - leyaguculwa ligama yabizwa nge-**African National Congress (ANC)** nga-1923 - kute ihlanganise ema-Afrika kuyo yonke imincele yebuhlanga neyetigodzi bese ifuna emalungelo esiveni sinye lesihlanganyelekile.

**I-1913 Natives Land Act**, leyabekela bamhlophe incenye lenkhulu yemhlaba welive, yakhombisa kutsi kungani bunye bebubalulekile ngekushesha. Buve bema-Afrika bekucala bebubi ngekulinganisela: basebentisa ticelo lesibhaliwe, timphumela-toya (deputations) kanye nemtsetfo kucela kufakwa.

items: Bekuhlose kwehlula kwehlukana kwebuhlanga bese kwakha sive sinye sema-Afrika, kwesikhatsini kwaba lesingakhetsi ngebuhlanga (non-racial) saseNingizimu Afrika.
Bekuchaza sive ngekwebuhlanga lobubodvwa nemalungelo - umbono lomkhulu wesive (civic).
Tindlela taso tekucala betiselawulweni lwemtsetfo; kukhungatseka kwatsi ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi kwabuchubela kusento lesikhulu.

media.alt: Timelela letinyenti letincane letihlukene tibambana etandleni takha sishingishane sinye, kubonisa bunye kuwo onkhe emacembu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Catsanisa umgomo wekusungulwa nebuve bemaBhunu: buve bema-Afrika befuna kwakha bunye kumacembu lamanyenti ema-Afrika (emaZulu, emaXhosa, emaSotho nalamanye) khona amelane nembuso lowawakhipha. Gcizelela umbono wesive lofakako (civic) - i-ANC ekugcineni yaya kubunye lobungakhetsi ngebuhlanga (non-racialism). Veta lenhloni le-unit lebuyela kiyo: tinhlobo tebuve letimbili taseNingizimu Afrika, lesinye sifuna kubusa, lesinye sifuna kufakwa, tibangana ngelive linye.

slides.title: Sitfukulane lesisha: i-ANC Youth League
slides.lead: Ngekufika kwema-1940 sitfukulane lesisha safuna buve bema-Afrika lobunesibindzi, lobusekelwe esiveni lesikhulu.

blocks.text: Bakhungatsekile ngemashumi eminyaka etincwadzi tekuncenga letinemphucuko, baholi labasha basungula **i-ANC Youth League** nga-1944. Mengameli waso wekucala, **Anton Lembede**, wagcizelela kutsi ema-Afrika kufanele atikhulule ngekutigcabha, kutimela nekutihlela esiveni kunekulindzela sihawu sabamhlophe.
I-Afrika live lemuntfu lomnyama... ema-Afrika amunye. Etiveni letehlukene kufanele kuvele sive sinye lesihlangene.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: Uhlelo lweSento (Programme of Action) lwe-Youth League lwango-1949 lwemukela kutefula, kubhoyikhotha nekungalaleli mtsetfo (civil disobedience).
Bantfu labanjenga Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu na-Oliver Tambo bakhuphuka kulamacembu aso.
Lobu buve bema-Afrika lobunesibindzi bebutawuchubela umzabalazo lomkhulu ngekumelana ne-apartheid ngema-1950.

slides.notes: Sebentisa siciniso saLembede kukhombisa inhlitiyo yemuzwa webuve bema-Afrika - kutimela nebunye kuwo onkhe emacembu ebuhlanga - kanti veta kutsi lisiko lelibanti le-ANC laphindze laya kubunye lobungakhetsi ngebuhlanga (kwesikhatsini iFreedom Charter). [SME] Bu-Africanism baLembede bekulucezu lunye; i-ANC yayinenkulumo-mphikiswano phakatsi kwebu-Africanism lobukhipha nebunye lobungakhetsi ngebuhlanga lobufakako, lokwatsi ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi kwaveta kwehlukana kwe-PAC (1959). Gcina lokushiyene: buve bema-Afrika bebungasibona bunye. Xhumanisa embili: lesitfukulane sihola iDefiance Campaign lebefundzwe eBangeni 9.

slides.title: Tinhlobo tebuve letimbili, live linye
slides.lead: Buve bemaBhunu nebuve bema-Afrika bakhula ndzawonye, ngamunye wakha lomunye.

items: Busekelwe ekwehlulweni yiBrithani nasebuphuyeni bebamhlophe labaphuyile.
Buhlanga: buchazwa ngeludzabu, siBhunu neSontfo.
Umgomo: kutibusa nekuvikela volk lemaBhunu.
Bawina umbuso nga-1948 base bakha i-apartheid.
Batfola inkhululeko yabo ngekubusa ngenkani labanye.
Busekelwe enchotshweni, ekulahlekelweni ngumhlaba nasekukhishweni ngaphandle.
Umgomo webuve (civic): kuhlanganisa emacembu lamanyenti abe sive sinye.
Umgomo: emalungelo lalinganako nekutibusa kwelinyenti.
Batfutfukela emzabalazweni lomkhulu kusukela ngema-1940-50.
Bafuna inkhululeko ngekufakwa, hhayi ngekubusa ngenkani.

slides.notes: Yima lapha kwentela sento sekucatsanisa lesihleliwe. Cela bafundzi bahlonze kufana (bobabili basebentisa umlandvo, lisiko nenhlangano kuhlanganisa; bobabili bafuna kutentela tincumo) nemehluko (lesinye siyakhipha futsi siyabusa, lesinye siyafaka futsi siyakhishwa). Gcizelela kusebentisana: kucindzetela kwebuve bemaBhunu kwavusa buve bema-Afrika, kanti kumelana kwema-Afrika kwacinisa buve bemaBhunu. Loku kwakhana kokabili kuwumcondvo lomkhulu wesigaba se-FET.

slides.title: Zionism: likhaya lebantfu bemaJuda
slides.lead: I-Zionism bekungumhlangano webuve locela likhaya lemaJuda, kakhulu ngekuphendvula emakhulwini eminyaka ekuhlushweni e-Europe.

blocks.text: Babhekene nekuzonda emaJuda ngendlela lenelunya - ema-pogrom eMbusweni waseRashiya (Russian Empire) kanye ne-Dreyfus Affair eFrance - **Theodor Herzl** wagcizelela ku-*The Jewish State* (1896) kutsi emaJuda atawuphepha kuphela nga-nembuso waso. I-First Zionist Congress yahlangana eBasel nga-1897, kanti nekufudukela kwemaJuda ePalestine kwakhula.

Ku-**Balfour Declaration (1917)** iBrithani yamemetela kusekela 'likhaya lesive sebantfu bemaJuda' ePalestine - live lelalinabantfu labaningi labema-Arab ngaleso sikhatsi. IBrithani yabusa iPalestine ngaphansi kwe-mandate ye-League of Nations ngemuva kwa-1920, kanti nekungezwani emkhatsini wemmango wemaJuda nema-Arab kwakhula.

items: I-Zionism yahlanganisa bunikati bebuhlanga nenkholo nesicelo sanyalo sembuso.
Beyichutjwa kuhlushwa kwangempela nalokubulalako, ngetulu kwako konkhe i-Holocaust ya-1941-1945.
Kodvwa live lebeyilibalako besekunelabahlala kilo bema-Arab labebanawo umuzwa wabo webuve.

media.alt: Inkhanyeti lenetinhloko letisitfupha ngetulu kwesijobelelo semkhawulo, imelela sicelo se-Zionism sekhaya lemaJuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Veta i-Zionism njengekuphendvula ekuhlushweni kwangempela nalokubulalako, lokwafinyelela ku-Holocaust - bafundzi kufanele bacondze kutsi kungani emaJuda lamanyenti agcina asho kutsi adzinga umbuso wawo. Ngesikhatsi lesifananako, cacisa ngeliciniso kutsi iPalestine beyisele nabantfu, kakhulu ema-Arab, ngako live linye labeselinetibango letimbili. [SME] Lona ngumlandvo lophikiswana kakhulu; gcina emacinisweni lavunyelwene ngawo kabanti (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, British Mandate) ungakhetsi luhlangotsi. Fundzisa kuhlola imitfombo: i-Balfour Declaration yaphindze yetsembisa kutsi ngeke ilimate emalungelo 'emmango lokhona longekabo bemaJuda'.

slides.title: 1948: inkhululeko nenhlekelele
slides.lead: Lesento sinye sango-1948 sikhunjulwa tive letimbili ngetindlela letiphambene.

blocks.text: Ngemuva kwe-Holocaust nekukhula kwekungezwani, i-United Nations yavota nga-1947 kwehlukanisa iPalestine ibe ngumbuso wemaJuda newema-Arab. Nga-**14 May 1948** baholi bemaJuda bamemetela **i-State of Israel**. Imphi netive letakhelene tema-Arab yalandzela masinyane.

Ema-Israeli akhumbula 1948 njenge-**War of Independence** yawo - kutfoleka kwelikhaya lelivikelekile. EmaPalestine akhumbula njenge-**Nakba** ('inhlekelele'): kulinganiselwa ema-Arab emaPalestine langaba ngu-700 000 abaleka nome axoshwa futsi angavunyelwa kubuya. Live linye, tive letimbili, tinkhumbulo letimbili letingahlangani.

items: Kulesinye sive, 1948 bekusho kutentela tincumo nekusinda.
Kulesinye, bekusho kwephucwa nekudingiswa.
Loku kungezwani lokungakacatululwa kusayakha i-Middle East nanamuhla.

media.alt: Live linye lehlukaniswe ngemudvwa loma ngci, luhlangotsi lolunye luyaphakama lolunye luyahamba, kubonisa tinkhumbulo letimbili letiphambene tango-1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi ngesona sithombe lesinemitwa kunayo yonke kulesigcaki; sifundzise njengesifundvo semibono nenkhumbulo yemlandvo. Veta onkhe emagama amabili a-1948 eceleni kwawo ngaphandle kwekuwabeka ngezinga, usebentise lulwimi lwe'kukhunjulwa njenge'. [SME] Tibalo netizatfu tekubaleka kwemaPalestine tiphikiswana ngempela ngebacwaningi bemlandvo (kubaleka kucatsaniswa nekuxoshwa); veta sibalo lesilinganiselwa ku-700 000 njengekulinganisela bese uveta inkulumo-mphikiswano. Umgomo wekufundzisa kuvelana nekuhlola imitfombo: sento lesifananako ngelusuku siveta tindzaba tebuve letimbili. Mema inkulumo-mphikiswano lethulile, lehloniphako futsi ubeke imitsetfo yekucala.

slides.title: Buve bema-Arab: bunye nenkhululeko
slides.lead: Buve bema-Arab bekufuna kukhulula bantfu labakhuluma siArab ekubusweni ngulabangaphandle bese, kulabanye, kubahlanganisa babe sive sinye.

blocks.text: Njengoba uMbuso wema-Ottoman (Ottoman Empire) wawa ngemuva kweMphi Yembulunga Yekucala (World War I), emave ema-Arab ehlukaniselwa ema-mandate eBrithani neFrance. Bantfu bebuve bema-Arab babengayitsandzi lenkululo yangaphandle nemincele leyadwetjwa ngemaYurophu, futsi baya bachubeka bamelana nekuhlala kwe-Zionist ePalestine.

Umhlangano wafinyelela esicongweni ngaphansi kwa-**Gamal Abdel Nasser** waseGibhithe (Egypt). Ngesikhatsi uNasser **etfumba i-Suez Canal nga-1956** wase abhekana nekuhlaselwa yiBrithani, iFrance ne-Israel, waba liqhawe kuwo wonkhe umhlaba wema-Arab neluphawu lwemihlangano yekulwa nebukoloni kuyo yonke i-Afrika ne-Asia.

items: Bekwakhelwe elulwimini lwesiArab lolufananako, esikweni na (kulabaningi) enkholweni yebuSlamu (Islam).
**I-Pan-Arabism** yayiphupha ngekuhlanganisa wonkhe ema-Arab, kwesikhashana yahlanganisa iGibhithe neSiriya nga-1958.
Bekumelana nebukoloni ngemandla futsi bekugcugcutela imizabalazo yenkhululeko yase-Afrika.

media.alt: Liketanga leliphukile ngetulu kwe-canal lelentiwe ngendlela lecondzile, limelela buve bema-Arab lobumelana nebukoloni kanye ne-Suez Crisis.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Khombisa buve bema-Arab njengomunye umhlangano lomelene nebukoloni, lokuxhumanisa simo se-Middle East kubuyele e-Afrika (isihloko se-CAPS sifaka totimbili). Nasser ne-Suez 1956 tiyintfo lesemcoka: emandla lamancane amelana nebosekela-bakoloni kwakhuluma umhlaba loguculako, kufaka ne-Afrika lengaphansi kwe-Sahara. Veta kungezwani ngekhatsi kwebuve bema-Arab phakatsi kwebunye be-pan-Arab neminye imibuso yetive letehlukene, nekutsi kumelana ne-Zionism bekungulusizatfu lolunye lolwahlanganisa. Xhumanisa emandla lamelene nebukoloni kubuve bema-Afrika lobebufundziwe ngaphambili.

slides.title: Tinhlobo tebuve letimbili, live linye
slides.lead: NjengeNingizimu Afrika, i-Middle East yabona tinhlobo tebuve letimbili tibanga live linye.

items: Kuphendvula ekuzondweni kwemaJuda e-Europe nase-Holocaust.
Buhlanga-nkholo: likhaya lebantfu bemaJuda.
Umgomo: umbuso wemaJuda lovikelekile ePalestine.
Batfola umbuso nga-1948 (Israel).
Kuphumelela kwabo kwaphucula bantfu bema-Arab bemaPalestine.
Kuphendvula ekuweni kwema-Ottoman nasekubusweni kwebukoloni bemaYurophu.
Kusekelwe elulwimini nasesikweni lesifananako sema-Arab.
Umgomo: inkhululeko na (kulabanye) bunye bema-Arab.
Kwafinyelela esicongweni ngaNasser ne-Suez Crisis ya-1956.
Kwamelana ne-Zionism kwaphindze kwagcugcutela i-Afrika lemelene nebukoloni.

slides.notes: Yenta lelo hlelo lekucatsanisa lelifananako neselayidi laseNingizimu Afrika. Bese wenta luhlelo lwekuxhumana emkhatsini wemacala kucace: kokabili iNingizimu Afrika nePalestine kukhombisa tinhlobo tebuve letimbili tibangana ngelive linye, kuveta kungezwani lokudze, lokubuhlungu. Cela bafundzi kutsi bacatsanise hhayi nje i-Zionism kubuve bema-Arab, kodvwa nebuve bemaBhunu ku-Zionism (bobabili tinyenti letifuna kuvikeleka nekubusa) kanye nebuve bema-Afrika kubuve bema-Arab (bobabili timhlangano lemikhulu lemelene nebukoloni). Lolu kucatsanisa kwetindlela letine kuncunywa nguletona kucabanga lokusetulu i-CAPS lekunika umvuzo.

slides.title: Buve: emandla lahlanganisako futsi lahlukanisako
slides.lead: Kuwo onkhe lamane emacala, buve banika bantfu bunikati nenkhululeko - futsi badweba imincele leyaholela ekulweni.

blocks.alt: Umugca wesikhatsi wetigameko letibalulekile tebuve kusukela nga-1897 kuya ku-1958 eNingizimu Afrika nase-Middle East.

events.label: I-SANNC (kwesikhatsini yaba yi-ANC) yasungulwa eNingizimu Afrika
I-ANC Youth League ivusa buve bema-Afrika
I-National Party iwina emandla; i-State of Israel imenyetelwa / i-Nakba
Nasser ne-Suez Crisis: sicongo sebuve bema-Arab

slides.notes: Cinisa ngalo mugca wesikhatsi lohlanganyelekile khona bafundzi babone lamane emihlangano ivuleka kulesikhatsi lesifananako, ikhweletana (kumelana nebukoloni kwasakata imibono ngetulu kwemincele). Dvweba isiphetfo: buve emandla lanetinhlangotsi letimbili - bwachuba inkhululeko ebukolonini nase-apartheid, kodvwa lapho tive letimbili tibanga live linye kwaveta kwephucwa nekungezwani lokungapheli. Veta 1948 njengomnyaka lomangalisako lophakati lovela emacaleni lamabili kanyekanye.

slides.title: Kubuketa: kucatsanisa tinhlobo tebuve
slides.lead: Sebentisa luhlaka lwemibuto lemihlanu netincatsaniso kuphendvula imibuto lengentasi.

blocks.text: Kulesifundvo sichaze buve, sehlukanise **buve bebakhaya (civic)** ku**buve bebuhlanga (ethnic)**, saphindze sacatsanisa timhlangano lemine: buve be**maBhunu** nebe**ma-Afrika** eNingizimu Afrika, kanye ne-**Zionism** nebuve bema-**Arab** e-Middle East. Kuto totimbili tigodzi tinhlobo tebuve letimbili tabanga live linye, ngemiphumela lesabalele.

blocks.question: Chaza umehluko phakatsi kwebuve bebakhaya (civic) nebuve bebuhlanga (ethnic), usebentisa SIBONELO sinye saseNingizimu Afrika naSINYE se-Middle East.
Catsanisa kuvela kwebuve bemaBhunu nebuve bema-Afrika. Bala okungenani kufana lokubili nemehluko lomibili.

'Tigameko tango-1948 tabesho inkhululeko kulesinye sive nekulahlekelwa kulesinye.' Usebentisa sibonelo seNingizimu Afrika NOMA se-Israel-Palestine, cocisana ngekutsi umzuzu munye wemlandvo ungakhunjulwa njani ngetindlela letiphambene.

slides.notes: Sebentisa lemibuto lemitsatfu njengomsebenti lobhaliwe nome inkulumo-mphikiswano yeklasi lehleliwe; kwabiwa kwemaka kufananisa netindlela te-CAPS tekubhala lokutsatsekile netisekelwe emitfonjeni. Umbuto 3 uhlola ngekusobala likhono lekucondza inkhumbulo lephikiswanako nemibono, lokusemcoka kulesihloko. Khumbuta bafundzi baphikise ngebufakazi baphindze bamele lonkhe luhlangotsi ngekulinganako. [SME] Ngaphambi kwekuhlola imininingwane ye-Israel/Palestine, cinisekisa kutsi sicondziso semnyango sekufundzisa lesihloko lesiphikiswanako silandzeliwe nekutsi kunikwe imitfombo leyehlukene.
